title: [MTR3/4] New Zealand Trains
description: This resourcepack adds New Zealand Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![nztrains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcc231f95a99390969d6abd7199bca550d131988.png)

## Introduction
This resource pack adds New Zealand Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 (NTE)

Compatible with [1067mm Railway RP ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr1067mm_rail)

## Terms & Disclaimer
This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

for more information and special credit, check readme inside the pack.

## Contents

- Kiwi Rail DF Class
- AK Carriage
- Mark 2 Carriage (Auckland, Te Huia, Capital Connection, Wairarapa Connection)
- AM Class (AT Metro)
- Container Train
- ADL Class DMU

Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!
